rationale: Educ. Code §21.209 governs teacher term-contract nonrenewal appeals to the commissioner. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A teacher who is aggrieved by a decision of a board of trustees on the nonrenewal of the teacher's term contract may appeal to the commissioner for a review of the decision of the board of trustees in accordance with the provisions of Subchapter G.
_note: No conflict. The rule_text concerns teacher contract appeals and is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
